category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI tool to extract metadata from and manipulate PDFs; official Read the Docs page describes pdfly as a CLI application for manipulating PDF files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pdfly; official documentation and GitHub repository use pdfly.
docs_sources: Official Read the Docs site is the dedicated documentation surface and links the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official documentation lists Repository: github.com/py-pdf/pdfly and source_facts.homepage is the official docs URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PDF extraction/manipulation; official documentation lists commands for metadata, page extraction, compression, text extraction, signing, and other PDF operations.
